symbols.name: HashHelper
symbols.summary: Provides utility methods to compute MD5 hashes from various input types.

symbols.name: Compute(byte[])
symbols.summary: Computes the MD5 hash of the specified byte array.

parameters.description: The input byte array to hash.

returns.description: A string representation of the computed MD5 hash. If input is null, returns an empty string.

parameters.description: The input byte array to hash.

returns.description: A string representation of the computed MD5 hash. If input is null, returns an empty string.

symbols.name: ComputeSha256(byte[])
symbols.summary: Computes the SHA-256 hash of the specified byte array.

parameters.description: The input byte array to hash.

returns.description: A string representation of the computed SHA-256 hash. If input is null, returns an empty string.

parameters.description: The input byte array to hash.

returns.description: A string representation of the computed SHA-256 hash. If input is null, returns an empty string.

symbols.name: Compute(Stream)
symbols.summary: Computes the MD5 hash of the given stream.

returns.description: A string representation of the computed MD5 hash in lowercase hexadecimal format. If the stream is null, returns an empty string.
A string representation of the computed MD5 hash in lowercase hexadecimal format. If the stream is null, returns an empty string.

symbols.name: ComputeSha256(Stream)
symbols.summary: Computes the SHA-256 hash of the given stream.

returns.description: A string representation of the computed SHA-256 hash in lowercase hexadecimal format. If the stream is null, returns an empty string.
A string representation of the computed SHA-256 hash in lowercase hexadecimal format. If the stream is null, returns an empty string.

symbols.name: Compute(string)
symbols.summary: Computes the MD5 hash of a byte array and returns it as a hexadecimal string.

parameters.description: The byte array for which to compute the hash.

returns.description: The hexadecimal string representation of the MD5 hash.

parameters.description: The byte array for which to compute the hash.

returns.description: The hexadecimal string representation of the MD5 hash.

symbols.name: ComputeSha256(string)
symbols.summary: Computes the SHA-256 hash of a string and returns it as a hexadecimal string.

parameters.description: The input string for which to compute the hash.

returns.description: The hexadecimal string representation of the SHA-256 hash.

parameters.description: The input string for which to compute the hash.

returns.description: The hexadecimal string representation of the SHA-256 hash.
